_readme: Uses custom prompts tailored for Dragon Medical One healthcare context.
Run: Actions > Generate Site Images (manual trigger) after editing.
To regenerate one image: delete its r2Key from image-manifest.json, re-run workflow.
DO NOT change 'key' values - referenced by index.astro.
No emoji or special characters in this file.

images.prompt: Australian GP doctor wearing stethoscope dictating patient notes by voice into a modern EMR system, clean medical practice, natural warm lighting, photorealistic
images.altText: Dragon Medical One cloud speech recognition - Australian doctor dictating patient notes by voice into EMR system

images.prompt: Friendly Australian healthcare IT support specialist helping a clinician set up voice recognition software on a desktop computer in a medical office, professional warm lighting
images.altText: Voice Recognition Australia team providing Dragon Medical One implementation support to Australian healthcare professionals

images.prompt: Abstract digital illustration of secure cloud infrastructure with glowing blue data streams, padlock icon, Microsoft Azure branding, clean dark background, enterprise healthcare security concept
images.altText: Microsoft Azure cloud security infrastructure with Australian data residency for Dragon Medical One healthcare encryption

images.prompt: Close-up of a medical specialist reviewing clinical notes on a tablet with a speech waveform overlay and medical terminology highlighted, clean modern UI, photorealistic
images.altText: Dragon Medical One specialty vocabulary interface showing clinical terminology and speech recognition for Australian medical specialists

images.prompt: Confident Australian female doctor smiling while using a headset microphone at a desk in a modern medical clinic, dictating into a computer, natural light, professional atmosphere
images.altText: Australian clinician using Dragon Medical One speech recognition with headset microphone in modern medical practice
